scope: hardware reference only; no ArduRover firmware changes

controller_stack.pixhawk: Pixhawk 2.4.8 / PIX 32-bit APM-compatible flight controller running ArduRover
controller_stack.companion: Raspberry Pi 4/5 or Pi Zero 2 W optional for logging/UI/network bridge; not required for Phase 1 firmware control
controller_stack.firmware_boundary: Use stock ArduRover features, RC/manual override, relay/servo outputs, and mission commands; keep custom firmware out of FEAT-003

bom.purpose: ArduRover controller, safety I/O, RC, telemetry, relay/servo outputs

bom.item: Raspberry Pi 4/5 or Pi Zero 2 W with buck supply
bom.purpose: Optional operator scripts/logging/camera later; not in control-critical power path
Low-frequency field telemetry under wet canopy

bom.item: RC receiver/transmitter with mode switch and kill/override channel
bom.purpose: Manual override and operator control priority

bom.item: JSN-SR04T waterproof ultrasonic modules or GY-US42 I2C alternatives
bom.purpose: Front obstacle plus left/right row reference sensing

bom.item: Tank float switch or non-contact liquid level sensor
0.5–1.2 MPa water pressure transducer or high/low pressure switch
bom.purpose: Detect dry-run, leak, blocked nozzle, or closed valve

bom.item: 12/24 V diaphragm pump sized to nozzle flow and pressure
12/24 V normally-closed solenoid valves, left and right
MOSFET/relay driver board with flyback protection, opto-isolation preferred
bom.purpose: Pixhawk/RPi logic controls pump and valves without powering loads directly

bom.item: Main battery, fused distribution, 5.3 V Pi buck, 5 V Pixhawk BEC, pump/valve fused rail
bom.purpose: Separate noisy actuator power from avionics logic

bom.item: Physical emergency stop cutting motor and pump/valve power independently of Pixhawk software
Nozzles, filters, tubing, check valves, pressure gauge, tank fittings

pinout.rule: RC/manual override must remain available independent of companion computer
Mission Planner/QGC telemetry; keep antenna clear of pump wiring
Required for outdoor row entry; do not commit real farm coordinates
Obstacle fault -> HOLD/stop and spray OFF
Row reference only; invalid readings must slow/stop, never steer into beds
Row reference only; invalid readings must slow/stop, never steer into beds
Never drive pump directly from Pixhawk; fault override OFF
Normally closed valve; OFF on transit/fault
Normally closed valve; OFF on transit/fault

pinout.connects_to: Pixhawk digital/analog input or companion GPIO with failsafe relay
pinout.rule: Low liquid -> pump and valves OFF; no automatic resume

pinout.connects_to: Pixhawk analog input or companion ADC
pinout.rule: Low/high pressure -> pump and valves OFF

pinout.connects_to: motor controller and pump/valve power rail
pinout.rule: Must cut actuator power independent of Pixhawk/RPi software
Optional companion link; not required for Phase 1 safety control

forbidden: directly powering pump or solenoid valves from Pixhawk GPIO/servo pins
depending on Raspberry Pi software for emergency stop
committing real farm coordinates or credentials
